headline: Jim Cramer Says “For the First Time in Ages, I Like Having a Position in Moderna”
summary: Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRNA) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer highlighted the stock’s significant gains during the year, as he said: If you look at the market’s best performers year to date, nearly all of them are either companies that […]

headline: Stock Market Week Ahead: Oil Hints At A Paradigm Shift
summary: The stock market trades largely sideways and oil dips to pre-Iran war prices heading into the final week before Q2 earnings. Here's what to watch.
